categoryFound.title: categoryFound
categoryFound.description: True only when the document reasonably matches exactly one supplied category. False is a valid, expected outcome — never force the closest fit.

categoryKey.title: categoryKey
categoryKey.description: The "key" of the selected category, copied exactly from the supplied list. Empty string when categoryFound is false.

categoryLabel.title: categoryLabel
categoryLabel.description: The "label" of the selected category, copied exactly from the supplied list. Empty string when categoryFound is false.

confidenceScore.title: confidenceScore
confidenceScore.description: 0–100 strength of the classification evidence. 85–100 strong distinctive evidence; 60–84 reasonable match with some uncertainty; 0–59 weak or ambiguous. Score the evidence, not relative likelihood.

ambiguous.title: ambiguous
ambiguous.description: True when two or more supplied categories were plausible for this document, even if one was ultimately selected.

documentReadable.title: documentReadable
documentReadable.description: False when the document could not be read or inspected well enough to attempt classification.

containsMultipleDocuments.title: containsMultipleDocuments
containsMultipleDocuments.description: True when the file appears to bundle several distinct documents (e.g. a combined scan). Classification then reflects the dominant document.

detectedLanguage.title: detectedLanguage
detectedLanguage.description: Primary language of the document as an ISO 639-1 code (e.g. "pl", "en"). Empty string if undeterminable.

evidenceSummary.title: evidenceSummary
evidenceSummary.description: Brief description of the observable document characteristics that drove the decision. Describe types of information present, never actual personal or sensitive values.

explanation.title: explanation
explanation.description: Brief reasoning: why the selected category is the best match, or why no category could be reliably selected. No personal or sensitive values.
